assessment.en: SolBrave is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line. Debuted in Random Booster Vol. 8. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: BulletGriffon Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the UX system.

assessment.en: BulletGriffon is a right-spin Balance type Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line Expand Blade (Infinity) system. It splits into an upper Bullet and lower Griffon during battle. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: GloryValkyrie Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the UX system.

assessment.en: GloryValkyrie is a right-spin Attack type Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line Expand Blade (Infinity) system. It features a spring-loaded bound mechanism for impact recoil. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: DranBrave Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: DranBrave is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Dran Lock Chip, Brave Main Blade and Slash Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: WizardArc Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: WizardArc is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Wizard Lock Chip, Arc Main Blade and Round Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: PerseusDark Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: PerseusDark is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Perseus Lock Chip, Dark Main Blade and Bumper Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: HellsReaper Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: HellsReaper is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Hells Lock Chip, Reaper Main Blade and Turn Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: RhinoReaper Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: RhinoReaper is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Rhino Lock Chip, Reaper Main Blade and Charge Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: HellsArc Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: HellsArc is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Hells Lock Chip, Arc Main Blade and Turn Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

assessment.en: FoxBrush is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Fox Lock Chip, Brush Main Blade and Jaggy Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: WhaleFlame Blade from the CX system.

description.en: WolfHunt Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: WolfHunt is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Wolf Lock Chip, Hunt Main Blade and Free Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: SolEclipse Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: SolEclipse is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Sol Lock Chip, Eclipse Main Blade and Dual Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: EmperorMight Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: EmperorMight is a right-spin Balance type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Emperor Metal Lock Chip, Might Main Blade and Heavy Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: PhoenixFlare Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: PhoenixFlare is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Phoenix Lock Chip, Flare Main Blade and Zillion Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: BahamutBlitz Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: BahamutBlitz is a right-spin Attack type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Bahamut Lock Chip, Break Over Blade, Blitz Metal Blade and Knuckle Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: KnightFortress Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: KnightFortress is a right-spin Defense type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Knight Lock Chip, Guard Over Blade, Fortress Metal Blade and Vertical Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: RagnaRage Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: RagnaRage is a right-spin Stamina type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Ragna Lock Chip, Flow Over Blade, Rage Metal Blade and Erase Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: UnicornDelta Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: UnicornDelta is a right-spin Balance type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Unicorn Lock Chip, Peak Over Blade, Delta Metal Blade and Odd Assist Blade. The Triple Style gimmick lets players rotate the three Blade parts to shift between Attack, Balance and Defense orientations. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: BrachioWhip Blade from the CX system.

assessment.en: BrachioWhip is a right-spin Stamina type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Brachio Lock Chip, Whip Metal Blade and Outer Over Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: T. Rex Blade from the Jurassic World collaboration.

assessment.en: T. Rex is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Jurassic World collaboration. Paired with the 1-80 Ratchet and Gear Ball Bit in its stock combo. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

description.en: Mosasaurus Blade from the Jurassic World collaboration.

description.en: Fort Hornet Blade from the Hasbro Custom Line.

assessment.en: Fort Hornet is a right-spin Balance type Custom Line Blade released by Hasbro. It combines the Hornet Lock Chip, Fort Main Blade and Round Assist Blade. Debuted with Fort Hornet R 7-60T.

description.en: Wriggle Kraken Blade from the Hasbro Custom Line.

description.en: Fang Blade from the Hasbro Custom Line.

assessment.en: Fang is a right-spin Attack type Custom Line Main Blade released by Hasbro. Debuted with Fang Leon T 4-60U. It features serrated downward-pointing blades designed to sap opponent stamina.
